description: Discover, install, update, list, and uninstall curated intent marketplace extensions.
routing_examples: Find a marketplace extension for [ calendar integration | irrigation control | energy management ]
Find a marketplace extension for [ weather monitoring | plugin development ]
Install a marketplace extension for energy management
Update an installed extension to the latest stable ref
Uninstall an extension I no longer need
router_hints: Use this intent when the user asks about extension discovery or extension lifecycle operations.
Use for curated marketplace operations only: list, list-installed, update, uninstall.
Do not use for normal home automation commands unless explicitly about extension management.
